title: ixeridium dentatum f. amplifolium
intro: Ixeridium dentatum f. amplifolium, a variant of the Ixeridium dentatum plant, is a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae. It is native to the high-altitude regions of the Himalayas and is also known as the Himalayan daisy or the Tibetan daisy. Ixeridium dentatum f. amplifolium has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which can be used to treat various health conditions. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, and is also used in Ayurvedic and Unani medicine to promote digestive health and reduce fever.
